generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorPMSM : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motor converting electrical input current (_I_M) into mechanical torque (_τ_M) via electromagnetic interaction"
]

instance GearboxCycloidal : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Gearbox transmission comprising a cycloidal gear system reducing torque while increasing rotational speed, with output torque (_τ_out_) derived from mechanical losses including friction"
]

instance SafetyCellConstraints : DTDFVocab:Constraint [
    base:desc "Mechanical safety cell limiting working range to [-90° 90°] and maximum speed to 75°/s, influencing operational dynamics"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder measuring angular position of the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderDataStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the cycloidal gearbox measuring output angle and reducing positional uncertainty"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderDataStream
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring electrical input current (_I_M) to the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataStream
]

instance TorqueVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring torque and angular velocity derived from encoder inputs and robot-specific dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueVelocityDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance EncoderDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueVelocityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueVelocitySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorGearboxSysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing motor-gearbox-axis architecture with flow definitions for rotational and electric energy"
]

instance MotorGearboxSysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram detailing motor-gearbox transmission components and their mechanical interactions"
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box analytical friction model combining Coulomb and viscous components for gearbox friction characterization"
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box analytical friction model incorporating Stribeck effect for lubrication-dependent friction behavior"
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box analytical friction model combining Coulomb, viscous, and hysteresis components for comprehensive friction characterization"
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque values derived from friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre) for comparison with measured data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity values adjusted for friction effects, generated from MATLAB Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured torque values transmitted via MQTT protocol from the gearbox output"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueVelocityDataStream
]

instance MeasuredVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured angular velocity values transmitted via MQTT protocol from encoder inputs"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderDataStream
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured electrical input current values transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataStream
]

instance FrictionModelMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata tracking source origin (sensor channel), time series, and traceability links for friction model data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardIntegration
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time sensor data streaming for position, current, and torque/velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink environment for executable friction models and system simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for creating Block Definition Diagrams (BDD) and Internal Block Diagrams (IBD) of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorGearboxSysMLBDD, MotorGearboxSysMLIBD
]

instance DashboardIntegration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard platform aggregating data traces for friction analysis and motion accuracy monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction analysis service identifying static, kinetic, and viscous friction components using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization service aggregating measured vs. simulated torque/velocity traces for physical relationship analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance DynamicModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling dynamic exchange of friction models during operation to improve motion accuracy via parameter adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the gearbox transmission system"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction models based on real-time data to reduce up to 30% motion inaccuracies caused by friction"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WearDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of mechanical wear patterns and load variations affecting friction behavior during operation"
]

instance TemperatureEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of temperature influences on friction characteristics and operational dynamics"
]

instance OperationalDiagnosticsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time diagnostics for identifying wear, load variations, or temperature effects influencing friction"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorPMSM, GearboxCycloidal, SafetyCellConstraints
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents; the digital shadow is described as a **passive entity** (one-way data flow) without active feedback to the physical system. The DT primarily processes data for analysis and visualization, enabling **continuous friction model updates** via simulation models (e.g., MathWorks MATLAB Simulink) but does not generate direct physical commands."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and continuous**:
  - Data collection and processing occur at **high-frequency intervals** (implied by live measurements and MQTT streams).
  - The digital shadow updates **instantaneously** to reflect operational changes (e.g., wear, load variations), enabling **sub-second synchronization** between physical and virtual models."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **single-axis focused** for the MABI MAX 100 robot’s first vertical axis. It integrates:
  - **Physical System**: The robot’s motor, gearbox, and encoders.
  - **Digital Shadow**: A **purpose-driven model** (friction analysis) with:
    - **Purpose**: Understanding friction loss for motion accuracy improvement.
    - **Data Sources**: Live measurements, simulation models, and metadata.
    - **Processing Components**: Simulation models (e.g., Simulink) and traceability links to data traces."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates primarily during the **operated stage** of the physical system’s lifecycle:
  - **As Operated**: Focuses on **real-time friction modeling** and accuracy improvements during active robot operation.
  - **As Designed/Manufactured**: Not explicitly addressed; the digital shadow is built for **operational use** with live data."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**: Comparison of **measured vs. simulated torque/velocity** data to validate friction models.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Use of **two encoders** (motor and gearbox) to reduce positional uncertainty.
  - **Traceability**: Explicit metadata linking data traces to their sources (e.g., sensor channels, simulation models).
  - **Verification**: Continuous alignment of digital shadow data with live operational data to maintain accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections are via:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Real-time data streaming from robot sensors to the digital shadow.
  - **SysML Models**: Structured communication between physical components (e.g., motor, gearbox) and digital models.
  - **Simulation Integration**: Data flows from live measurements to simulation models (e.g., Simulink) for friction analysis."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is deployed as a **dashboard-based visualization tool** for operational monitoring. The hosting infrastructure is not explicitly detailed in the documents, but the system likely involves a centralized server or edge computing platform to process real-time data streams."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed; the digital shadow is **scope-limited to the robot’s first axis**. Horizontal integration with other DTs or external systems (e.g., CNC controllers) is not addressed in the documents."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed; the documents focus on technical implementation but do not address ownership or privacy policies for the collected sensor data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **SysML** for structural/behavioral modeling.
  - **MQTT** for real-time data communication.
  - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for simulation models.
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** for conceptual framework (UML class diagram)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed; the digital shadow is described as a **passive entity** without active feedback to the physical system. Potential risks (e.g., remote operation of the robot) are not addressed in the documents."
]
